name: SOLBOY
description: Meet Solboy, Solana’s new 2026 mascot. Built for the next cycle, powered by culture, memes, and community momentum. Every chain has its icons. Solana just found its face. Get ready to welcome Solboy, who is set to become the vibrant embodiment of Solana's future. He's designed to capture the essence of what makes Solana special – its dynamic community, its innovative spirit, and its readiness to embrace what's next. Solboy will be at the forefront, celebrating milestones, engaging with fans, and truly representing the heart of the Solana ecosystem as we move forward together! ✨
